zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Baguley於1474年出生在英國英格蘭爾奧勒頓時，他的父親Sir John de Baguley Bigelow22歲，母親Ellen D Biloxham19歲。他於大約1494年與Alice Bury de Vernon在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1540年在英國爾奧勒頓享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Baguley于1474年出生在英国英格兰爾奧勒頓时，他的父亲Sir John de Baguley Bigelow22岁，母亲Ellen D Biloxham19岁。他于大约1494年与Alice Bury de Vernon在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1540年在英国爾奧勒頓享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Baguley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley (Cheshire). The placename is from Old English bagga denoting an unidentified animal, perhaps the badger, + lēah ‘wood, clearing’. Compare Bagley .

variants.name: Bagley
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley in Cheshire or from any of several places called Bagley, in Devon, Gloucestershire, Shropshire, Somerset, and Yorkshire. These get their names either from the Old English personal name Bacga + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ or from an unattested Old English word, bagga, for a ‘bag-shaped’ object or creature + lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Baguley was born in 1474, in Ollerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John de Baguley Bigelow, was 22 and his mother, Ellen D Biloxham, was 19. He married Alice Bury de Vernon about 1494, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1540, in Ollerton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Baguley est né en 1474, à Ollerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Baguley Bigelow, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Ellen D Biloxham, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Alice Bury de Vernon environ 1494, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1540, à Ollerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Baguley 1474 in Ollerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Baguley Bigelow 22 und seine Mutter Ellen D Biloxham 19. Er hat um 1494 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Alice Bury de Vernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1540 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Ollerton, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Baguley è nato il nel 1474 nel Ollerton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John de Baguley Bigelow, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Ellen D Biloxham, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Alice Bury de Vernon circa 1494, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1540, nel Ollerton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Baguleyが1474年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオラートンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Baguley Bigelowは22歳，母Ellen D Biloxhamは19歳であった。約1494年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでAlice Bury de Vernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1540年にイギリスチェシュアイアオラートンで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Baguley(이)가 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Baguley Bigelow(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen D Biloxham(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Alice Bury de Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1540년 영국 체실르 레르턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Baguley nasceu em 1474, em Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Baguley Bigelow, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Ellen D Biloxham, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Bury de Vernon aproximadamente 1494, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1540, em Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Baguley родился в 1474 г. в местности оллиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John de Baguley Bigelow было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen D Biloxham, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Bury de Vernon около 1494 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1540 г. в местности оллиртон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Baguley nació en 1474, en Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Baguley Bigelow, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Ellen D Biloxham, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alice Bury de Vernon aproximadamente 1494, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1540, en Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
